nodes.name: Create Webflow Item
nodes.notes: Uses HTTP Request because Webflow v2 API gives more control over field mapping. Replace WEBFLOW_COLLECTION_ID in the URL with your actual collection ID, or set it as an n8n environment variable.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, webflow_item_id: $('Create Webflow Item').first().json.id }) }}
